dict.string: openMOON needs access to your microphone for voice dictation.
openMOON needs access to speech recognition for voice commands.
openMOON needs to control other applications to perform automation tasks.
openMOON needs screen capture access to take screenshots.
openMOON needs to send notifications for reminders and alerts.
openMOON needs location access to read your current Wi-Fi network name on macOS.
